Openness.description: Openness measures creativity, imagination, and a preference for novelty.

questions.text: You're starting a new adventure—what excites you most?

b.text: Enjoying something familiar with a small twist

c.text: Sticking to what I know and love

questions.text: What's one creative or unusual hobby you've recently tried or want to try?

Conscientiousness.description: Measures organization, discipline, and goal-oriented behaviors.

questions.text: When faced with multiple tasks, you typically...

a.text: Create a clear plan and follow it step-by-step

b.text: Have a rough idea and adapt as I go

questions.text: Can you briefly share how you stay organized when things get busy?

Extraversion.description: Indicates outgoingness, energy, and enthusiasm in social settings.

questions.text: In your ideal weekend scenario, you'd prefer...

a.text: A vibrant gathering or party with friends

b.text: A balance of socializing and alone time

c.text: Quiet time to relax by yourself

questions.text: What kind of social activities energize you most?
When your team has a conflict, you usually...

a.text: Actively mediate to find common ground

b.text: Encourage open dialogue but avoid taking sides

questions.text: Can you briefly describe how you usually handle disagreements?

Emotional_Stability.description: Reflects calmness, resilience, and emotional balance under pressure.

questions.text: When things don't go according to plan, you generally...

a.text: Stay calm and immediately find a solution

c.text: Feel overwhelmed and take a while to adjust

questions.text: What's one way you keep calm when facing stressful situations?

Visionary.description: You're imaginative and inspiring, bringing bold ideas and enthusiasm to every project. 🌟

Operator.description: You're organized, reliable, and ensure everything runs smoothly and efficiently. ⚙️

Catalyst.description: You're energetic, empathetic, and bring people together, boosting morale and cooperation. 🤝

Pragmatist.description: You're calm and grounded, guiding your team toward practical, realistic goals. 🎯

Explorer.description: You're curious, adaptable, and thrive on discovering new experiences. 🗺️
